name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, missed maintenance schedules cause tenant complaints. We provide timely notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Missed maintenance schedules lead to tenant complaints and potential property damage.
features: simple dashboard for tracking due services
manual entry for custom maintenance tasks
